routes.label: Eligible Student or Recent Graduate — Individual

stable_constraints.message: The entrant must be at least 18 at submission.
The entrant must own or license all intellectual-property rights required for the entry.
Current Dyson group and James Dyson Foundation employee or family conflicts are ineligible.

routes.label: Team Led by an Eligible Student or Recent Graduate

stable_constraints.message: Every team member must be at least 18 at submission.
The team must own or license all intellectual-property rights required for the entry.
Current Dyson group and James Dyson Foundation employee or family conflicts are ineligible.

Medical and Health.category: No formal category — invention that solves a problem

Accessibility and Inclusive Design.category: No formal category — invention that solves a problem

Consumer Technology.category: No formal category — invention that solves a problem

Commercial and Industrial.category: No formal category — invention that solves a problem

Social Impact.category: No formal category — invention that solves a problem

Sustainability and Circular Design.category: No formal category — Sustainability Winner is supplementary

Concept and Speculative Design.category: No formal category — invention that solves a problem

criteria.official_name: Significance of the invention and how well it solves a problem
Commercial viability and whether people will want it
Ability to manufacture at a reasonable price
Sustainability issue addressed or incorporated into process, materials, or manufacturing

notes: The award has no conventional category taxonomy; never award exact-category credit.
Prototype status is not a stable eligibility gate.
Warn entrants that entry publication may affect IP strategy; do not provide legal advice.
Use only public official sources; do not reintroduce any removed private James Dyson records.
